title: credentials — data retention windows
description: Gate scans are HIGH VOLUME. Hot in Postgres 90 days; warm in Athena/S3 for 1 year (attendance audits + clone detection tuning); purged after. Security incident scans retained 7yr under legal-hold exception.

policies.description: Retained indefinitely while active. Revoked credentials retained for 7yr audit trail (link between credential + holder + scans).
Standard scans: hot 90d in Postgres, warm 1yr in Athena/S3, purge. HIGH VOLUME storage cost mitigation.
Clone-detection incident scans retained 7yr under legal-hold. Feeds compliance audit trail.
Refused scans matching clone detection retained indefinitely for pattern analysis.
